item.title: She Went From Working For Royalty To A Prison Cell
item.description: Jane Andrews once worked as a dresser for Sarah Ferguson and appeared to live an enviable life. Everything changed after a turbulent relationship ended in a high profile murder case that captivated the United Kingdom.

media:content.media:title: She Went From Working For Royalty To A Prison Cell
media:content.media:description: Jane Andrews once worked as a dresser for Sarah Ferguson and appeared to live an enviable life. Everything changed after a turbulent relationship ended in a high profile murder case that captivated the United Kingdom.

item.title: A Newlywed's Chilling Confession Shocked Everyone
item.description: Miranda Barbour made national headlines after claiming she had committed numerous killings across the United States while being investigated for the death of a man she met online. Her shocking statements sparked intense debate about what was true, what was exaggerated, and what investigators could actually prove.

media:content.media:title: A Newlywed's Chilling Confession Shocked Everyone
media:content.media:description: Miranda Barbour made national headlines after claiming she had committed numerous killings across the United States while being investigated for the death of a man she met online. Her shocking statements sparked intense debate about what was true, what was exaggerated, and what investigators could actually prove.

item.title: A Mother's Online Posts Hid A Dark Secret
item.description: Lacey Spears shared constant updates about her son's health struggles on social media, gaining sympathy and support from thousands. Investigators later uncovered evidence that led to murder charges and one of the most disturbing caregiver abuse cases in recent years.

media:content.media:title: A Mother's Online Posts Hid A Dark Secret
media:content.media:description: Lacey Spears shared constant updates about her son's health struggles on social media, gaining sympathy and support from thousands. Investigators later uncovered evidence that led to murder charges and one of the most disturbing caregiver abuse cases in recent years.

item.title: A Love Triangle Led To A Deadly Plan
item.description: Brenda Delgado became the focus of an international manhunt after authorities accused her of orchestrating a plot against a romantic rival in Texas. The case exposed jealousy, obsession, and a scheme that ultimately unraveled across multiple countries.

media:content.media:title: A Love Triangle Led To A Deadly Plan
media:content.media:description: Brenda Delgado became the focus of an international manhunt after authorities accused her of orchestrating a plot against a romantic rival in Texas. The case exposed jealousy, obsession, and a scheme that ultimately unraveled across multiple countries.

item.title: An Ex Girlfriend's Obsession Took A Dangerous Turn
item.description: Brenda Delgado became the target of an international manhunt after investigators alleged she orchestrated a plot against her ex boyfriend's new partner. The case exposed a troubling mix of jealousy, fixation, and a plan that ultimately unraveled in court.

media:content.media:title: An Ex Girlfriend's Obsession Took A Dangerous Turn
media:content.media:description: Brenda Delgado became the target of an international manhunt after investigators alleged she orchestrated a plot against her ex boyfriend's new partner. The case exposed a troubling mix of jealousy, fixation, and a plan that ultimately unraveled in court.

item.title: His Disturbing Crimes Left An Entire City Horrified
item.description: Daniel Rakowitz became one of New York City's most infamous criminals after a series of shocking acts in the late 1980s. The case drew widespread attention because of its disturbing details and the questions it raised about mental illness, public safety, and the justice system.

media:content.media:title: His Disturbing Crimes Left An Entire City Horrified
media:content.media:description: Daniel Rakowitz became one of New York City's most infamous criminals after a series of shocking acts in the late 1980s. The case drew widespread attention because of its disturbing details and the questions it raised about mental illness, public safety, and the justice system.

item.title: A Routine Traffic Stop Led Police To America's Most Prolific Serial Killer
item.description: New York state troopers pulled over a pickup truck without license plates and discovered a victim's remains hidden in the back. The arrest unraveled a three-year string of undetected crimes, resulting in a prison sentence totaling over two hundred years.

media:content.media:title: A Routine Traffic Stop Led Police To America's Most Prolific Serial Killer
media:content.media:description: New York state troopers pulled over a pickup truck without license plates and discovered a victim's remains hidden in the back. The arrest unraveled a three-year string of undetected crimes, resulting in a prison sentence totaling over two hundred years.
